metadata.name: Review Employee Expense Report for Policy Violations

description: A compliance officer is reviewing an employee's expense report for any violations of company policy.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the employee's submitted expense report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the specified expense report.

nodes.task_description: Automatically scan the report for common policy violations (e.g., expenses over limit, missing receipts).

expected_outcome.value: The system flags one expense for a meal that is over the per-diem limit.

nodes.task_description: Reject the non-compliant line item and notify the employee to correct it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent rejects the specific expense and sends an automated notification to the employee with the reason.
